title: will / shall
examples: We'll try it all the way throughout the venue.
Let's do a bud light and I'll get a pretzel as well.
Calle will call your name by the TV when you're full.

title: can / could / be able to
examples: Can we do one big papa and one blue moon?
We can hold the glass in the show.
That's exactly what you can do.
We couldn't leave early on that.

title: could have (done)
examples: You couldn't have picked a better game to go see.

title: have to / must
examples: You gotta have to do anything in life, just the ability to hang in there, grind it out until you reach your goal.

title: should (advice)
examples: We should just wait over here.

title: would (habit/conditional)
examples: Like you would find other specialty beers.
You'd walk down the aisle and everyone would be giving you high fives.

title: Passive (is done / was done)
examples: It was tied with seconds left in the game and they kicked the field goal to win the game.
